title: centaurea regia subsp. cynarocephala
intro: Centaurea regia subsp. cynarocephala is a subspecies of the Centaurea regia plant, commonly known as a type of thistle, which is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Centaurea regia subsp. cynarocephala include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, while also being used to treat conditions such as fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications to promote wound healing and reduce pain.
